description: Output schema for granule invalidator task.

granules.description: Array of granuleId's identified for removal
granules.title: Granules

forceRemoveFromCmr.description: Flag indicating whether to force remove granules from CMR
forceRemoveFromCmr.title: Forceremovefromcmr

granules_to_be_deleted_count.description: Total count of granules to be deleted
granules_to_be_deleted_count.title: Granules To Be Deleted Count

aggregated_stats.description: Summary statistics including counts of granules to be removed and retained, broken down by invalidation type
aggregated_stats.title: Aggregated Stats

title: GranuleInvalidatorOutput
